messages.text: The reliquary-warden closes a hand sheathed in hardened calcite around you and squeezes, as though testing whether you would sit well in a niche. The blow {verb} you!
The reliquary-warden reaches for you with a calcite-crusted grip and you twist free, leaving a smear of pale dust across your arm.
The reliquary-warden lifts you toward an empty niche, and a skin of cold calcite begins to creep up your limbs before you tear loose! The blow {verb} you!
